sendBatchNotification(String, String, String, String, String) - Method in class com.example.eventlotterysystem.NotificationRepository
Sends a notification to a specific sub-group of an event's waitlist based on their status.

Sends a notification to a specific list of user IDs.

This method sets whether the device should contain REMEMBER_ME_KEY

SettingsActivity - Class in com.example.eventlotterysystem
This is a class that is the controller of the activity_settings screen this is the activity that allows a user to change their preference settings(when implemented) and account information allows a user to create an account and then navigates them to home activity also is where the user can delete their account
SettingsActivity() - Constructor for class com.example.eventlotterysystem.SettingsActivity
 
SettingsActivityTest - Class in com.example.eventlotterysystem
Tests the functionality of the SettingsActivity this activity allows a signed-in user to update their profile information
SettingsActivityTest() - Constructor for class com.example.eventlotterysystem.SettingsActivityTest
 
setTitle(String) - Method in class com.example.eventlotterysystem.NotificationItem
Sets the title shown for this notification.
setType(String) - Method in class com.example.eventlotterysystem.NotificationItem
Sets the notification type.

This method checks if the device should be remembered for subsequent application startups
SignupActivity - Class in com.example.eventlotterysystem
This is a class that is the controller of the activity_signup screen allows a user to create an account and then navigates them to home activity
SignupActivity() - Constructor for class com.example.eventlotterysystem.SignupActivity
 
SignupActivityTest - Class in com.example.eventlotterysystem
Tests the functionality of SignupActivity this activity allows an entrant to provide profile information and create an account
SignupActivityTest() - Constructor for class com.example.eventlotterysystem.SignupActivityTest
 
signUpAfterDeadlineTest() - Method in class com.example.eventlotterysystem.ViewEventActivityTest
Ensures user cannot sign up to an event that has passed its deadline
signUpButtonTest() - Method in class com.example.eventlotterysystem.ViewEventActivityTest
Test if clicking on the sign up button signs up a user to the waitlist
signUpToDatabaseTest() - Method in class com.example.eventlotterysystem.ViewEventActivityTest
Test if clicking on the sign up button updates the waitlist on the database
signUpWhenFullTest() - Method in class com.example.eventlotterysystem.ViewEventActivityTest
Ensures user cannot sign up to an event that is at max sign-ups
